label: Planner
items: One clear New Plan button — the two AI design modes (Reimagine a space, plan around My Plants) now tuck into a little dropdown beside it instead of three buttons competing for space
Plans without a cover photo get a soft coloured tile instead of flat grey — greens for plant-first plans, brand green for the rest
Each plan card now shows a phase-progress bar so you can see at a glance how far along your projects are

label: Routines
items: Routine cards are now colour-coded by care type — watering blue, pruning green, harvest yellow — so you can scan your schedule at a glance
Each card shows a little 30-day dot track of when it's due next, instead of a tiny line of dates
Pause and delete buttons are always visible now, not just on hover — much easier on a phone
The Filters button shows how many filters you've applied instead of just an exclamation mark

label: Plant Lens
items: Camera-first on your phone — Open Camera leads and the capture area fills the screen instead of a desktop-style upload box
While the AI works you now see what's happening — "Reading your photo… matching with Pl@ntNet… cross-checking with Rhozly AI" — over a soft blur of your own picture, instead of a frozen button
The four analysis buttons calmed down — one clean style with coloured icons; Analyse stays the star
A little sparkle marks the moment your plant is identified
